creator: mezz7@cox.net
text:
I can't reproduce it. It looks like you are using freebsd-update (because  
of root@i386-builder.daemonology.net), right? I don't really understand  
this error, but I am guessing that your /usr/lib/libpthread.a is probably  
broke. Or maybe it was from some where.

Cheers,
Mezz
